title: आ गई Powertrac Shaurya Series साउथ इंडिया कस्टमर के लिए | Paddy Special Tractor | Powertrac Shaurya
description:
#powertrac 
Escorts Kubota Launches Powertrac Shaurya, a Tractor Series for Southern India's Paddy Sector
The five-variant range, spanning 39 HP to 52 HP, is the Powertrac brand's first product line designed for paddy and wetland farming in Southern India.

Escorts Kubota Limited launched the Powertrac Shaurya tractor series on Tuesday, marking the first time the company has introduced a dedicated paddy and wetland-focused range under its Powertrac brand. The series, comprising five variants across the 39 HP to 52 HP range, is targeted at paddy-growing regions including Telangana, Andhra Pradesh, Tamil Nadu and Karnataka.

The company said the tractors will be available through authorised Powertrac dealerships in Southern India.

Escorts Kubota operates three tractor brands in India — Kubota, Farmtrac and Powertrac — serving the premium, entry-premium and value segments, respectively. The Shaurya series sits within the Powertrac portfolio, which caters to the company's value and mass market customers.

The tractors have been engineered for operation in waterlogged and wetland field conditions. Key features include cassette-type sealing across major components to prevent water and mud ingress, a turning radius of 3.1 metres for use in small and medium-sized fields, and a fully constant mesh gearbox with 8 forward and 2 reverse gears.

The series offers Sensi-1 hydraulic lift with a capacity range of 1,600 to 2,000 kg, depending on the variant. An independent PTO lever with double clutch supports implement control, and dual PTO options — 540/1000 rpm and reverse PTO — are available for a range of paddy applications. A perforated elevated platform, protected wiring harness routing inside the fender channel, and an adjustable slider seat with anti-slip pads are also included.

Nikhil Nanda, Chairman and Managing Director, said the launch aligned with the company's objective of deepening its presence in paddy markets through application-specific products. Akira Kato, Deputy Managing Director, noted that product development for the series began with field conditions rather than standard platforms. Bharat Madan, Whole-time Director and CFO, said the product would improve the regional composition of the company's tractor portfolio.

description:

In this video, we meet Sukhbir Ji from Rakhi Khas, who has completely transformed his 2011 model New Holland 3630. Despite being 15 years old, this tractor performs better than many new models. The owner has personally modified it by installing a Turbocharger, converting it to Power Steering, and upgrading the tyres from 14-inch to 16-inch for better grip and power. We take a deep dive into its performance on the field with an 11-tine cultivator and check its fuel efficiency and sensing power. Watch how a farmer’s passion can turn an old machine into a high-performance beast!

Poni Chiva, Poni Tua. Let me introduce first. Thank you so much, sir, for talking to us. We have with us Mr. Rajan Chukh sir and Pooji San and also Mr. Rahul Masan with us. He is the product head. And so first of all, I want to know what kind of expectation you have with these four products. So I think our expectation is we come true to our customers' needs and expectations. So we hope that last few years our engineers, our product team, our manufacturing team all have worked together to draw insights and learnings from farmers on their evolving new needs. We have taken a lot of time to understand their new needs and needs and we have tried our best to translate them into solutions. Our engineers have worked in Japan, India. We hope that our customers will like our new platform. We are bringing 21 horsepower to 27 horsepower and 7 family members are joining us. Yes. And we will get as much love as the farmers have given for different fields and solutions. And we will take it forward. What kind of expectation do you have with the product? Yes. page_content: Hello farmers! We are in Nashik today where Kubota has launched their new and amazing Neo Star series. In this special launch event, Kubota has presented such compact and powerful tractors which are specially designed to keep the Bhagwani, vineyard, sugarcane and inter cultivation farming in mind. So let's see what is special about the farmers in this series. Watch the video till the end and subscribe to the Khetigadi YouTube channel and press the bell icon for the latest updates. In this new series of Kubota, Neo Star A211S, A211SN, B24640S, B24640SN, B27640S and B27640SN are included in the series. In the first sight, the premium design of the tractors and the compact look are very impressive. To work easily in a less space, the tractors have been specially designed to be narrow. This makes it a very useful use in orchard and vineyard farming. Neo Star series is specially designed for vineyard, sugarcane and inter cultivation farming. Vineyard, that is, in the field of grapes, there are very few places in the middle of the rose where large tractors are not able to work easily. In this way, the narrow models of Neo Star are easily operated in small places due to their low climb and shortest turning radius of 2.1 meters. This makes the tractor easily move in a less space and the crops are also less affected. In this farming, there is a need for narrow field operation and better traction. For this, a powerful 4WD drive system is given. In inter-culturation farming, field operation is often required. That is why Kubota has focused on the compact design, integrated power steering and comfortable operator platform. If we talk about the performance, then in the Neo Star series, Kubota's advanced ETVCS engine is given which gives smooth operation with low vibration and low noise. This engine gives better pickup and more torque, which can work easily in tractor tough farming conditions. Along with it, EcoPTO 540 and 750 RPM are given. Which gives better performance in sprayer applications with the help of fuel. The engine key stop feature is also given in this which allows the tractor to start and close the tractor from the key. Like you do in a car. Kubota has also focused on operator comfort. Adjustable and foldable suspension seat, integrated power steering and flat platform features give more comfort to the operator during long work time. In the same, 4WD drive system also provides better traction in weight and loose soil. This makes the work of the tractor easier. If we talk about the models, then in the Neo Star A211SN, it comes in 21 HP category in which you can see the 2.9 feet width of the vehicle. Whereas in the B-Choice 41S24HP, you can see the ground clearance of the 325mm. In the narrow model, you get a short turning radius of 2.1 meter and 2.98 meter width. In the B-Choice 41S24HP, the tractor has a super draft control and 750kg lift capacity. In the narrow model, you get a short turning radius of 2.1 meter which helps the heavy implementations to handle easily. Kubota has made these tractors for multiple applications. This tractor has a 750kg lift capacity with its sprayer, cultivator, rotawater and plow-like implementations. For easy maintenance, one piece is fully open bonnet which makes engine and battery access much easier. In addition, wet disc brakes, north forward, plus 3 reverse gears and 5 year warranty make this series even more powerful. By combining the new Kubota Neo Star series, we can take care of the needs of modern horticulture farming. Compact design, advanced Japanese technology, better comfort and powerful performance can be very beneficial for farmers in the coming season. page_content: Hello farmers! Today we are in Faridabad where Digitrack has launched three new tractors making their new and powerful all-black series stronger. There are five tractors displayed here. But today we will talk about the three new models PP41I, PP43I+, and PP640I 4WD which have just been launched and are ready to make the work of the farmers even easier and more powerful. Watch the video till the end and subscribe to the farming YouTube channel and press the bell icon for latest updates. First of all, if we talk about this all-black series then its design comes with a very premium and aggressive look. The whole black theme gives it a different identity whether it is farming or road presence these tractors attract attention from far away but not only looks but also performance is the same. Now let's talk about the first model PP41I. You get three cylinders in this 45 HP category tractor with a 2.7-liter engine which gives almost 41 HP PTO power. PTO power is quite good which can easily run rotawaters and cultivator-like implements. It has a torque of around 110-200 Nm which doesn't stop the engine even in heavy loads. Along with it, there are double clutch and 12 plus three constant mesh gearbox which is given with side shift which makes gear shifting smooth and easy. It has a hydraulic lifting capacity of up to 2000 kg which makes it even more versatile. Talking about the tyre size, you get a front tyre of 6.5-6. and rear tyre of 1428. You get sprinkler oil immersed brakes and you also get a heat guard for safety. Now let's move on to the second model. PP41I Plus This model is an upgrade version of power and performance. It has a 3-cylinder, 3.5-liter engine which is of 22 HP category. It has a great PTO HP of 43 HP and it has a torque of 230 Nm which is considered quite strong for heavy duty work. It also has the same reliable double clutch system and 12 plus three gearboxes. It also has a hydraulic lift capacity of 2000 kg which can easily handle big implements. Talking about the tyre size, you get front tyre of 7.5-6. and rear tyre of 1428. You get sprinkler oil immersed brakes and you also get a heat guard for safety. If you do heavy farming from the medium, this tractor can be a strong option. Now let's talk about the powerful and special model. PP640I 4WD As it is known as clear, you get 4-wheel drive in this model which gives a better grip in tough and slippery conditions. It has a 4-cylinder, 3.6-liter engine which is of 55 HP category. You get a great PTO HP of 46 HP. It has a torque of 247 Nm which is considered perfect for heavy duty farming, loader work and tough terrain. PTO is quite strong which can run multiple implements efficiently. Because of 4WD, its stability and pulling power are both great. Now let's talk about common features. You get power steering in these 3 tractors which makes you less tired to work long. LED headlamps increase visibility at night and a comfortable seat is a large platform which makes the operator comfortable. Also, MRPTO, Heat Shield, Company fitted bumper and features like tow hook make it more practical. Another special thing is the ground clearance and turning radius of these tractors. Due to high ground clearance, tractor runs smoothly in uneven fields. And it is easier to maneuver in small fields by less turning radius. Speed also goes up to 35-49 kmph which makes transport work faster. So farmers, these were the 3 great tractors launched on Digitrack. They are great to see and they are also great in performance. page_content: Hello, farmers! Welcome to the episode 32 of the Furniture and Car Present Tractor Talk Season. In Tractor Talk, we, farmers, answer the questions asked. In Tractor Talk, one or two more farmers gave a very wonderful response, which is thanks to their farmers. Tractor Talk Season 1 and 2 will answer the questions asked by the farmers in this season. I, Shivam, will try to answer your questions today. So, let's start today's episode. Watch the video till the end and subscribe to the Khetigadi YouTube channel and press the bell icon for the latest updates. Today's first question is from us, Guru Charan Ji. When will the Farm-Track 50 Pro Max 4-wheel drive come? Greetings, sir. If we talk, then the company has given the 4-wheel drive option, but it is only available in the models from 49 HP to 140 HP. There has not been any model launch of 50 HP in this series so the question is not whether the Pro Max 4WD will be available in 50 HP. It is clear that the Pro Max series comes with 4WD, but the 50 HP version is not available in the market yet. It is possible that the company may think about the 50 HP model launch, but there is no official news yet. We will definitely review our Khetigadi YouTube channel as soon as it comes. Sir, should Swaraj drive the 855 tractor in the 4th medium gear? Please answer my question, sir. I need your answer. Greetings, sir. It is absolutely right to drive the tractor in the 4th medium gear in the Swaraj 855FI. But it depends on the work and condition. If you are working lightly, such as driving a cultivator, or taking a light trolley or a dry and clean ground, then using the 4th medium gear is considered normal and safe. But if you are working heavy, such as a rotavator, deep jet or driving a load of more than a load trolley, then it is not right to drive the tractor in this gear. Because it is more pressure on the engine, the clutch plate can be damaged quickly and the performance of the tractor also decreases. So always keep in mind that if the engine starts to sound or the sound starts to change, then the gear should be reduced immediately. It is clear that the 4th medium gear is correct, but it should be used only in a light and correct condition. Our next question is, how much RPM is left for the work of the PTO? For example, for the jet, for the threshing. Some people say that 2100 to 2200 RPM is correct. Is this correct? PTO, power take-off. It is very important to keep the correct RPM for the work. Only then does the machine work in the right way and does not much return on the tractor. In most tractors, the PTO standard is 540 RPM, which is usually around 1,700 to 1,900 RPM on the engine. For jet, rotavator and threshing work, it is best to drive the tractor on the same RPM where 540 PT is being completed. That is, around 1,800 RPM. Many people drive PTO on 2100 to 2200 RPM, but it is not considered correct for long periods because more diesel is spent on it, the engine is suppressed and the machine can be driven quickly. Therefore, the best way is to work according to the 540 PTO mark given in the tractor meter, which will also improve the work and make the tractor life. If you like the video, then like the video, subscribe to the channel, press the bell icon and share the video with your friends in your business. If you want to buy any tractor in India, then download it now. You will get all the information about the tractor there on our Kheti Gadi Mobile Application Play Store. You can compare the tractor there. You can ask for insurance for tractor. You can buy a good amount for your farm. Download the Kheti Gadi Mobile Application for all of them. Kheti Gadi is better than expected. We will meet soon in the next tractor video. Jai Jawan, Jai Kisan.

filename: नये रूप में आ गए है New Holland के ये ट्रैक्टर New Holland 3032 Smart and New Holland  3600_2WyKrF136JA.txt
title: नये रूप में आ गए है New Holland के ये ट्रैक्टर New Holland 3032 Smart and New Holland  3600
description:
नमस्ते दोस्तों!
आज के इस वीडियो में हम बात करने वाले हैं किसान भाइयों के पसंदीदा ब्रांड New Holland के दो शानदार ट्रैक्टर्स के बारे में। कंपनी ने अपने 3032 TX Smart और 3600 TX मॉडल को नए अवतार और बेहतरीन फीचर्स के साथ पेश किया है।
इस वीडियो में हम इन दोनों ट्रैक्टर्स की पावर, माइलेज, कीमत और नए बदलावों के बारे में विस्तार से जानेंगे।

वीडियो में मुख्य जानकारी (Video Highlights):

New Holland 3032 TX Smart: यह 37 HP श्रेणी का एक दमदार ट्रैक्टर है। इसमें 2365 CC का इंजन मिलता है जो 137.4 Nm का जबरदस्त टॉर्क पैदा करता है। इसकी Lift-O-Matic तकनीक और 6 साल की वारंटी इसे छोटे और मध्यम किसानों के लिए सबसे स्मार्ट विकल्प बनाती है।

New Holland 3600 TX : यह 50 HP कैटेगरी का बादशाह है। इसमें FPT S8000 इंजन और Double Clutch जैसे आधुनिक फीचर्स दिए गए हैं। इसकी 1700-1800 किलोग्राम की भारी लिफ्टिंग क्षमता इसे रोटावेटर और थ्रेशर जैसे भारी उपकरणों के लिए परफेक्ट बनाती है।

नया रूप और डिजाइन: दोनों ट्रैक्टर्स अब नए ग्राफिक्स, बेहतर एलईडी लाइट्स और आरामदायक ऑपरेटर सीट के साथ आते हैं।

प्रमुख तकनीकी विशेषताएं (Specifications):

फीचर्स New Holland 3032 TX Smart New Holland 3600
HP श्रेणी -- 37 HP                                 --50 HP
इंजन क्षमता 2365 CC                                 --2931 CC
PTO पावर 33 HP                                     --46 HP
गियरबॉक्स 8 Forward + 2 Reverse --8F+2R / 12F+3R
लिफ्ट क्षमता 1100 KG 1700                       -- 1800 KG
वारंटी 6 साल / 6000 घंटे                         -- 6 साल / 6000 घंटे

कीमत की जानकारी (Expected Price):
New Holland 3032 TX Smart: ₹5.40 लाख* (एक्स-शोरूम) से शुरू।
New Holland 3600 TX: ₹7.99 लाख* (एक्स-शोरूम) से शुरू।

(नोट: कीमतें आपके राज्य और शहर के अनुसार अलग-अलग हो सकती हैं, सही कीमत के लिए नजदीकी डीलर से संपर्क करें।)
